creator: danger@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I'm closing this PR, as I wasn't able to reproduce the described 
problem. I tried the following searches and got results: 

- single lines fields containing "exilim" (one match usb/102976) 
- single lines fields containing "exilim" with closed results 
included (2 matches kern/53601, usb/102976) 
- single lines fields containing "exilim" with closed results 
included and category set to usb (one match usb/102976)
